rows.notes: Shillings '9' is clear. Pence column has a dark blot/ink smudge that resembles a '1' but could be bleed; chose '1' based on a small upward stroke in the pence column aligned with other pence digits. Column alignment otherwise clear.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial payment from Bennington, amounting to £0 9s 1d.

rows.notes: Large centered script acting as a section header; no monetary amounts present.

rows.description: Yardington Rect. pro 5 ann. mie. 1730 a Tho. Rounsettor
rows.notes: Pounds '50' is clearly written in the pounds column; shillings/pence columns blank (interpreted as 0). Some uncertainty in exact paleography of the descriptive text but amount alignment is clear.
rows.english_description: Arrears of five years' payments for the Yardington rectory owed by Thomas Rounsettor dating from 1730.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of five years' rent for the Yardington rectory from Thomas Rounsettor, amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Shillings '12' is legible. Pence shows '0' with a small halfpenny mark (loop/ob) just to the right — interpreted as a halfpenny (0.5). Some uncertainty in place-name reading but the monetary figures and halfpenny sign are visible.
rows.english_description: Arrears from Cattswick (Woll) arising from an inquisition for the year 1736.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears from Cattswick (Woll) arising from an inquisition for the year 1736, amounting to £0 12s 0.5d.

rows.description: - Gunsewwoy pro Bien. & Dimd. al An. 1734

rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears from Gunsewwoy for two years and a half to 1734, amounting to £2 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Pounds '9' is clearly in the pounds column; shillings/pence blank (interpreted as 0). Minor uncertainty in capitalization/spelling of the name, amounts clear.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears recorded for Mason D. J. B. for 1742, amounting to £9 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Pounds '20' clear. Description is somewhat faded and uncertain in spelling but monetary amount alignment is unambiguous.

rows.notes: Centered section header in larger script; no amounts present.
Date written in left margin adjacent to this receipts section. No monetary amounts on the same line.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation receipts from Copes and Brown relating to Kidlington, amounting to £2 15s 0d.

rows.description: Mudenham pr 4ta parte an: ad part Net
rows.notes: Amounts read as 1-13-4; the description (place and Latin phrasing) is moderately ambiguous but numerals align well to the columns.
rows.english_description: Payment representing a fourth part of the annual rent from Mudenham apportioned to the net account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: One-quarter share of the annual payment from Mudenham to the net account, amounting to £1 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Pounds and shillings (27-13) are clear. Pence column shows '1' with a small halfpenny mark (loop) immediately to the right — interpreted as 1½d (pence whole 1 with 0.5 fraction). Handwriting of the description is moderately unclear which slightly lowers confidence.
rows.english_description: Part-year rent from Loyouth.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Part-year rent from Loyouth, amounting to £27 13s 1.5d.

rows.description: Excheq Annuity pro dim: cau: ad part annum:

rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-year Exchequer annuity apportioned to the net account, amounting to £25 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Subtotal line beneath the receipts shows 119-18-11½. Numbers are well aligned and the halfpenny mark is visible after the pence; interpreted as 11 pence + 0.5.
Centered small heading introducing the next receipts subsection; no amounts on this line.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Mr Wilcock for Dr Hortridge's benefaction (mid-1759), amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Cash received from Mr Payne by bill on the same account in January 1759, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Plate money received from Mr Buckley, amounting to £0 8s 0d.

rows.notes: Subtotal for this receipts subsection reads 208-0-0 and is clearly aligned in the totals column.
Final total at the bottom-right reads 791-4-0. Nicely aligned and legible; the label 'Summa Receptorum' is clear in the left-hand description area.
